name: Hermes
description: Kirk's personal AI assistant — autonomous task execution, job search pipeline, smart home control, calendar, email, and research.

authentication.description: Bearer token issued by AgentLocker OAuth (Supabase). Token scoped to agent owner only.

skills.name: Job Search Pipeline
skills.description: Searches job boards, scores listings against a profile, and manages a curated job queue. Returns structured job objects with fit scores, lane assignments, and reasoning.
examples: Find new AI security jobs matching my profile
Score these 10 job listings against my resume
What jobs are in my queue right now?

skills.name: Web Research
skills.description: Searches the web, extracts and summarizes content, synthesizes information from multiple sources. Can monitor topics over time with scheduled runs.
examples: Research the current state of MCP vs A2A protocols
Find and summarize recent arxiv papers on RLHF
What's the latest on Navy cyber career paths?

skills.name: Code & Development
skills.description: Writes, reviews, and debugs code. Manages git repos, opens PRs, runs tests. Supports Python, TypeScript, React, bash.
examples: Review the latest PR on agentlocker-job-cockpit
Write a React component for displaying agent cards
Debug why the Vercel build is failing

skills.name: Calendar & Email
skills.description: Reads and manages Google Calendar events. Reads, searches, and drafts Gmail messages in Kirk's voice.
examples: What's on my calendar this week?
Draft a follow-up email to the hiring manager at Palantir
Schedule a reminder for the Europe trip planning

skills.name: Smart Home
skills.description: Controls Philips Hue lights, scenes, and rooms via OpenHue. Can set scenes, adjust brightness/color, and respond to presence.
examples: Turn on the reading scene in the office
Set all lights to 20% warm white
What scenes are available in the living room?
